init_eqs_str: a['time_speed'] = 0; a['mid_norm'] = 0; a['warp_scale'] = 0; a['q6'] = 0; a['q1'] = 0; a['q5'] = 0; a['bass_thresh'] = 0; a['treb_thresh'] = 0; a['mid_thresh'] = 0; a['q4'] = 0; a['treb_norm'] = 0; a['beat'] = 0; a['q2'] = 0; a['audio_energy'] = 0; a['q3'] = 0; a['q7'] = 0; a['bass_norm'] = 0; a['q8'] = 0;
frame_eqs_str: a['bass_thresh']=0.6; a['treb_thresh']=0.4; a['mid_thresh']=0.5; a['bass_norm']=div(a['bass'],a['bass_att']); a['treb_norm']=div(a['treb'],a['treb_att']); a['mid_norm']=div(a['mid'],a['mid_att']); a['audio_energy']=div(((a['bass_norm']+a['treb_norm'])+a['mid_norm']),3); a['time_speed']=(0.5+(a['bass_norm']*0.5)); a['time']=(a['time']+(0.033*a['time_speed'])); a['q1']=(0.5+(Math.sin((a['time']*0.3))*0.5)); a['q2']=(0.5+(Math.cos((a['time']*0.4))*0.5)); a['beat']=((Math.abs(((a['bass']>2)?1:0))>0.00001)?(Math.floor(rand(2))):(a['beat'])); a['q3']=a['beat']; a['q4']=(0.2+div(a['bass_norm'],2.5)); a['q5']=(0.0575+div(a['treb_norm'],2.5)); a['q6']=(a['time']*0.1); a['q7']=(0.5+(Math.sin((a['time']*0.2))*0.5)); a['q8']=(0.5+(Math.cos((a['time']*0.25))*0.5)); a['warp_scale']=(1.0-(a['mid_norm']*0.3)); a['zoom']=(1.0+(a['bass_norm']*0.5)); a['rot']=((a['time']*0.1)+(a['treb_norm']*0.2));
